description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with a mix of light gray and black exterior finishes. The front includes a covered porch with seating, a wide driveway leading to a two-car garage, and a landscaped entryway with shrubs. Large windows line the front and side, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The rear and side elevations show additional windows and a secondary entrance, while the upper level appears to be a partial loft or open space. The driveway is paved with light tiles, and a car is parked in front of the garage. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a black and gray facade, large windows, a covered porch, and a two-car garage with a tiled driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, two-car garage, tiled driveway, and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, car, and large windows on the side facade.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying grouped large windows and the back portion of the bungalow with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single large window and the side of the garage, with the driveway and car visible in the distance.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
